SEARCH
Package com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators

Class AbstractReferendumEvaluator<T extends Referendum>

java.lang.Object
com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of referendum to be evaluated
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReferendumEvaluator<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConditionalReferendumEvaluator, QuotaReferendumEvaluator, SimpleReferendumEvaluator
public abstract class AbstractReferendumEvaluator<T extends Referendum> extends Object implements ReferendumEvaluator<T>
An abstract class representing a generic evaluator for referendums Provides methods for evaluating the outcome of a referendum based on collected referendum forms Implements the template method pattern, where the evaluate method serves as a template for the algorithm and delegates the specifics to subclasses via abstract methods

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReferendumResult
    evaluate(T referendum, List<ReferendumForm> referendumForms)
    Function to evaluates the outcome of a referendum based on collected referendum forms This method follows the template method pattern, providing a skeletal implementation that defines the algorithm for evaluating the referendum and delegates the specific steps to concrete subclasses by calling abstract methods
    protected float
    getVoteWeight(Voter voter, Referendum referendum)
    Calculates the weight of a voter's vote in the referendum

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public ReferendumResult evaluate(T referendum, List<ReferendumForm> referendumForms)
      Function to evaluates the outcome of a referendum based on collected referendum forms This method follows the template method pattern, providing a skeletal implementation that defines the algorithm for evaluating the referendum and delegates the specific steps to concrete subclasses by calling abstract methods
      Specified by:
      evaluate in interface ReferendumEvaluator<T extends Referendum>
      Parameters:
      referendum - The referendum to be evaluated.
      referendumForms - The list of collected referendum forms.
      Returns:
      The result of the referendum evaluation.

    • getVoteWeight

      protected float getVoteWeight(Voter voter, Referendum referendum)
      Calculates the weight of a voter's vote in the referendum
      Parameters:
      voter - The voter casting the vote
      referendum - The referendum for which the vote is cast
      Returns:
      The weight of the voter's vote
